2.description: Count buildings with status FA in Kristiansand

candidates.database_description: Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Flood zone data showing inundation areas for specific flood return periods such as 20-year, 200-year, and 1000-year flood scenarios. Useful for scenario-based flood analysis and flood-risk filtering.

Storm-surge and sea-level-rise hazard data showing coastal inundation areas for different return periods and future sea-level scenarios. Useful for coastal flood exposure analysis and scenario-based hazard assessment.
